name: GLAW Oversight Board Core Policy
authority_boundary: GLAW may analyze, draft, route, and assemble workpapers. A human with lawful authority holds the human seal for filing, serving, signing, transmitting, charging, paying, submit-live actions, or any binding/coercive act.

escalation_triggers.description: Any autonomous route asks GLAW to file, serve, sign, transmit, charge, pay, or submit live.
escalation_triggers.source_requirement: The escalation must cite SRC-#### evidence showing the requested human-only act and the current authority boundary.

escalation_triggers.description: The same glaw-loop route repeats past the iteration cap or remains latched after a failed fix cycle.
escalation_triggers.source_requirement: The escalation must cite SRC-#### loop evidence or a hash-backed loop_decisions.jsonl excerpt.

escalation_triggers.description: Bank reconciliation, tax tie-out, source subledger hash, or accounting-control manifest row is blocked.
escalation_triggers.source_requirement: The escalation must cite SRC-#### bank, ledger, tax-return, or source-book workpapers.

escalation_triggers.description: IRS, SEC, PCAOB, court, regulator, enforcement, or litigation adversary lens does not survive.
escalation_triggers.source_requirement: The escalation must cite SRC-#### reviewer evidence and the RED-team attack text.

escalation_triggers.description: A high-stakes legal, tax, accounting, or SEC proposition lacks trusted authority corpus support or groundedness.
escalation_triggers.source_requirement: The escalation must cite SRC-#### authority capture, corpus id, and groundedness artifact.

escalation_triggers.description: Any filing, transmission, tax return, SEC report, court packet, payment, charge, or external signature package is ready for human seal.
escalation_triggers.source_requirement: The escalation must cite SRC-#### final packet digest, chief decision, docket state, and human authority basis.

decision_rules.minimum_evidence: SRC-#### final packet digest, source manifest, cleared compliance_action_plan, and human-authority basis.
conditions: No critical/high red flag remains unresolved.
No prohibited autonomous act is delegated to GLAW.
decision_rules.audit_entry: Record oversight_decision approve with source, reason, actor, role, and conditions.

decision_rules.minimum_evidence: SRC-#### blocked control row with owner, next_command, required_fix, and missing fields.
conditions: Owner is a real GLAW seat or human-oversight-board.
Fix can be rerun through the normal gate chain.
decision_rules.audit_entry: Record oversight_decision fix with owner, required_fix, and source.

decision_rules.minimum_evidence: SRC-#### defect evidence showing unsupported authority, failed adversary, unresolved red flag, or missing source tie-out.
conditions: Matter remains blocked until the owner cures and reruns gates.
Denial is visible in the oversight ledger.
decision_rules.audit_entry: Record oversight_decision deny with failed gate and source.

decision_rules.minimum_evidence: SRC-#### safety, ethics, data-integrity, legal-authority, or compliance evidence requiring stop-work.
conditions: Autonomous loop and daemon stop routing.
Resume requires a separate RBAC ADMIN decision.

decision_rules.minimum_evidence: SRC-#### evidence that the halt condition was cured and the next route is bounded to analysis/workpaper preparation.
conditions: Resume reason states why the specific halt condition is cured.
Human-only acts remain behind the authority gate.
decision_rules.audit_entry: Record kill_switch_resumed with actor, role, reason, and source.

required_evidence: Every Board escalation or decision should identify a current SRC-#### evidence basis.
Every blocked compliance row must preserve owner, next_command, required_fix, and missing fields.
Every approve/resume path must state the human-seal boundary and RBAC ADMIN actor.
Every fix/deny/halt path must name the gate, owner, and source-backed reason.
